use_cases: Dashboard navigation with animated tab switching between different content views
Team management interface with role and permission displays
Project overview displaying daily performance summaries and metrics
Communication hub for team threads and discussions
Resource management panel for documentation and file organization
ai_summary: A bento-style dashboard card featuring animated tab navigation between four content panels: Dashboard, Management, Threads, and Resources. Built with Framer Motion for smooth transitions using LayoutGroup and AnimatePresence, with badge indicators on active tabs. The component uses Hugeicons for iconography and supports responsive design with rounded-3xl borders. Ideal for SaaS dashboards and admin interfaces requiring organized multi-section views.
